originalTitle: Wall Street ends higher as investors turn to earnings season
summary: STORY: U.S. stocks closed higher on Friday, with the Dow gaining nearly three-tenths of a percent, the S&P 500 adding more than four-tenths of a percent to end just short of a record high, and the Nasdaq climbing nearly three-tenths of a percent. The AI trade returned to the spotlight after South Korean memory chip maker SK Hynix ended almost 13% above its offer price at $168 in a blockbuster U.S. listing. The company raised over $26 billion on Thursday by selling American Depositary Receipts priced at $149 each. U.S. stocks added to gains after President Donald Trump said that Iran had asked to continue talks and the U.S. had agreed, but that the June ceasefire was "over." Ross Mayfield is investment strategist at Baird Private Wealth Management. "Today I think markets are a little bit higher as it's evident once again that neither Iran nor the U.S. really want to re-engage in a hot war in the Middle East. This is going to be a volatile back and forth, who knows what will happen over the weekend. But I do think even a little bit of calm is helping markets, helping yields and oil pull back. And then this is kind of a calm before the storm. Not a lot going on today besides the SK Hynix debut. But next week - retail sales, CPI (Consumer Price Index), and the start of bank earnings. So a lot for investors to prep for, kind of a calm before the storm trading day." Stocks on the move Friday included Meta Platforms, which jumped 6% to its highest level since April. Shares of Moderna tumbled almost 11% in its worst day in over a year. And shares of Delta Air Lines dropped more than 1.5%, even after the carrier forecast third-quarter profit above expectations. Investors now look to quarterly earnings season, which kicks off next week.

chineseTitle: 随着投资者转向财报季，华尔街收高
chineseSummary: 故事：美国股市周五收高，道琼斯指数上涨近十分之三，标准普尔 500 指数上涨逾十分之四，收盘仅接近历史新高，纳斯达克指数上涨近十分之三。韩国存储芯片制造商 SK 海力士在美国上市，其股价较发行价 168 美元上涨近 13%，之后人工智能行业重新成为人们关注的焦点。该公司周四通过出售每张定价 149 美元的美国存托凭证筹集了超过 260 亿美元资金。在唐纳德·特朗普总统表示伊朗已要求继续谈判且美国已同意但六月停火已“结束”后，美国股市上涨。罗斯·梅菲尔德 (Ross Mayfield) 是贝尔德私人财富管理公司的投资策略师。 “今天我认为市场有点走高，因为很明显伊朗和美国都不想在中东重新卷入热战。这将是一个来来回回的波动，谁知道周末会发生什么。但我确实认为，即使是一点点平静也会帮助市场，帮助收益率和油价回落。然后这是暴风雨前的平静。除了 SK Hynix 首次亮相之外，今天没有太多事情发生。但下周 -零售销售、CPI（消费者价格指数）以及银行财报的开始，投资者需要做好很多准备，这在暴风雨交易日之前是平静的。”周五上涨的股票包括 Meta Platforms，该股上涨 6%，达到 4 月份以来的最高水平。 Moderna 股价下跌近 11%，创下一年多来最糟糕的一天。尽管达美航空预测第三季度利润高于预期，但其股价仍下跌超过 1.5%。投资者现在关注下周开始的季度财报季。

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
